raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead with delta +17.1° to waypoint 39, confirming continued left arc; applying 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to smoothly follow the curve.
knowledge: Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683
Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)
Car is slightly left of center (~0.22m) but all wheels on track — acceptable on inside of curve
Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-25° entering/maintaining curve at speed 1.5
After the left curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m
Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves
Curve continues through wp33-42 (y increases from 1.7 to 2.7), delta stays ~17-18°
Car heading stabilized near 90° confirming we are at the top of the left curve
Delta ~17° at wp39 confirms moderate left curve — maintain 15° left steering
Heading increasing steadily each step (~4-8°/step) — curve is consistent and predictable
